name: Hengbao Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hengbao Co.,Ltd. provides smart products and solutions in China and internationally. The company offers fiscard, e-bank security, WAP security, payment, and platform solutions for banking industry; mobile communication, platform, and mobile payment solutions for telecommunication industry; and social insurance, residents health card, citizen card, and tax control solutions for government sector. It also provides city I pass, ETC card, and transportation permit solutions for the transportation industry; and enterprise I pass, campus I pass, magnetic cards, and IOT products for various industrial applications. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
